homepage.heroSubline: Durable, custom fences built to withstand New York's toughest conditions. Quality craftsmanship and reliable service, guaranteed.
homepage.aboutTitle: Crafting Security and Style Across NYC
aboutText: Fence Factory started as a small team of dedicated craftsmen, driven by a passion for delivering exceptional fencing solutions throughout the five boroughs. We've grown steadily, always prioritizing quality materials and meticulous installation.

We believe in doing things right the first time. Our approach combines proven techniques with a commitment to understanding each client's unique needs and aesthetic preferences. We prioritize open communication and transparent pricing.

Fence Factory is proud to be a part of the New York community. We source materials locally whenever possible, supporting local businesses and minimizing our environmental impact. We actively participate in community improvement projects.

services.name: Wood Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Classic wood fences for privacy and curb appeal.
services.description:
Wood fences offer a timeless aesthetic and natural beauty that complements any New York property. At Fence Factory, we specialize in crafting durable and visually appealing wood fences tailored to your specific needs. We offer a variety of wood types, including pressure-treated pine, cedar, and redwood, ensuring resistance to rot, insects, and the harsh New York climate. 

Our skilled craftsmen handle every step of the installation process, from precise post setting to expert board placement. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring straight lines, secure connections, and a flawless finish. Whether you're seeking a traditional picket fence, a privacy fence, or a decorative accent, we'll create a wood fence that enhances your property's value and provides lasting enjoyment. We also handle any necessary permits and inspections, making the process hassle-free for you. 

Proper staining and sealing are crucial for protecting your wood fence from the elements. We offer professional staining and sealing services using high-quality products designed to withstand New York's seasonal changes, preventing warping, cracking, and fading.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment and Design Consultation
Step 2: Material Selection and Permitting
Step 3: Precise Post Setting and Framework Construction
Step 4: Board Installation, Staining, and Sealing

faq.question: How long will a wood fence last in New York?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance, a well-constructed wood fence can last 15-20 years in New York. Regular staining and sealing are essential to protect it from the elements.

faq.question: What type of wood is best for fences in NYC?
faq.answer: Pressure-treated pine and cedar are excellent choices for fences in NYC. They are naturally resistant to rot and insects, making them ideal for our humid climate.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to build a fence in New York City?
faq.answer: Yes, in most cases, you will need a permit to build a fence in New York City. We can handle the permit application process for you.

services.name: Vinyl Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Low-maintenance vinyl fences for lasting beauty and durability.
services.description:
Vinyl fences offer a practical and attractive fencing solution for New York homeowners. Known for their exceptional durability and minimal maintenance requirements, vinyl fences are an ideal choice for busy individuals seeking a long-lasting and aesthetically pleasing boundary. At Fence Factory, we provide expert vinyl fence installation services, ensuring a flawless finish and years of worry-free enjoyment.

Our vinyl fences are crafted from high-quality, UV-resistant materials that withstand the harsh New York sun, preventing fading, cracking, and warping. Unlike wood fences, vinyl fences never require painting or staining, saving you time and money on upkeep. A simple wash with soap and water is all it takes to keep your vinyl fence looking its best. We offer a wide range of styles and colors to complement your home's architecture and personal preferences.

From classic picket fences to privacy fences and decorative accents, we can create a custom vinyl fence that meets your specific needs. Our experienced installers ensure precise post setting, secure connections, and a seamless finish. We handle all aspects of the installation process, including site preparation, permitting, and inspections, making the experience as smooth and stress-free as possible. Choose Fence Factory for a vinyl fence that enhances your property's value and provides lasting beauty.
process: Step 1: Site Survey and Design Consultation
Step 2: Material Selection and Permitting
Step 3: Professional Post Setting and Framework Assembly
Step 4: Panel Installation and Final Inspection
benefits: Wide Range of Styles and Colors
Resistant to Fading, Cracking, and Warping

faq.question: How long will a vinyl fence last in New York?
faq.answer: A high-quality vinyl fence can last 30 years or more in New York with minimal maintenance.

faq.question: Does vinyl fencing fade in the sun?
faq.answer: Our vinyl fences are made with UV-resistant materials that prevent fading, even in direct sunlight.

faq.question: Is vinyl fencing more expensive than wood fencing?
faq.answer: While the initial cost of vinyl fencing may be slightly higher than wood, the long-term cost is often lower due to reduced maintenance expenses.

services.name: Chain Link Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Affordable and secure chain link fences for residential and commercial properties.
services.description:
Chain link fences provide a cost-effective and reliable security solution for residential and commercial properties in New York. Known for their durability and ease of installation, chain link fences offer a practical way to define boundaries, secure property, and protect pets and children. Fence Factory specializes in professional chain link fence installation, ensuring a secure and aesthetically pleasing barrier.

We offer a variety of chain link fence options, including galvanized steel, vinyl-coated, and black powder-coated, to meet your specific needs and preferences. Our galvanized steel fences provide exceptional strength and corrosion resistance, while our vinyl-coated and powder-coated options offer enhanced aesthetics and added protection against the elements. We can customize your chain link fence with privacy slats, gates, and other accessories to enhance its functionality and appearance.

Our experienced installers ensure precise post setting, secure connections, and a taut, uniform mesh. We handle all aspects of the installation process, including site preparation, permitting, and inspections, making the experience as seamless and stress-free as possible. Whether you need a chain link fence for your backyard, your business, or a construction site, Fence Factory delivers quality workmanship and reliable service.
process: Step 1: Site Evaluation and Design Planning
Step 2: Material Selection and Permitting
Step 3: Precise Post Setting and Concrete Anchoring
Step 4: Chain Link Mesh Installation and Tensioning
benefits: Versatile Applications for Residential and Commercial Properties

faq.question: How long does a chain link fence typically last?
faq.answer: A galvanized steel chain link fence can last 20-30 years or more with minimal maintenance.

faq.question: Can I add privacy slats to a chain link fence?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a variety of privacy slats that can be easily installed to enhance the privacy of your chain link fence.

faq.question: What is the difference between galvanized and vinyl-coated chain link?
faq.answer: Galvanized chain link is coated with zinc for corrosion resistance, while vinyl-coated chain link has an added layer of vinyl for enhanced aesthetics and protection.

services.name: Aluminum Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Elegant and rust-proof aluminum fences for a sophisticated look.
services.description:
Aluminum fences offer a sophisticated and low-maintenance fencing solution for discerning New York homeowners. Known for their elegant appearance and rust-proof properties, aluminum fences enhance curb appeal while providing security and defining property lines. At Fence Factory, we specialize in professional aluminum fence installation, ensuring a flawless finish and lasting beauty.

Our aluminum fences are crafted from high-quality, powder-coated aluminum that resists rust, corrosion, and fading, even in the harsh New York climate. We offer a wide range of styles and colors to complement your home's architecture and personal preferences. From traditional ornamental designs to sleek, modern styles, we can create a custom aluminum fence that meets your specific needs and aesthetic goals.

Our experienced installers ensure precise post setting, secure connections, and a seamless finish. We handle all aspects of the installation process, including site preparation, permitting, and inspections, making the experience as smooth and stress-free as possible. Choose Fence Factory for an aluminum fence that enhances your property's value and provides lasting elegance.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation and Site Assessment
Step 2: Material Selection and Permitting
Step 3: Precise Post Setting and Concrete Footings
Step 4: Panel Installation and Final Inspection
benefits: Wide Range of Styles and Colors

faq.question: Will an aluminum fence rust?
faq.answer: No, aluminum fences are naturally rust-proof and corrosion-resistant.

faq.question: How long will an aluminum fence last?
faq.answer: A high-quality aluminum fence can last 30 years or more with minimal maintenance.

faq.question: Can I customize the look of my aluminum fence?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a wide range of styles, colors, and accessories to customize the look of your aluminum fence.

services.name: Fence Repair & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Reliable fence repair services to keep your fence in top condition.
services.description:
Even the most durable fences require occasional repairs and maintenance to ensure their longevity and functionality. Fence Factory offers comprehensive fence repair and maintenance services throughout New York, addressing issues such as damaged posts, broken boards, sagging gates, and general wear and tear. Our experienced technicians provide prompt and reliable service, restoring your fence to its optimal condition.

We handle all types of fence repairs, from minor fixes to major overhauls. Whether your wood fence has suffered from rot or insect damage, your vinyl fence has cracked from impact, or your chain link fence has been damaged by a storm, we have the expertise and resources to restore it. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting repairs.

In addition to repairs, we also offer routine maintenance services, such as staining, sealing, and pressure washing, to protect your fence from the elements and extend its lifespan. Regular maintenance can prevent costly repairs down the road and keep your fence looking its best. Contact Fence Factory for all your fence repair and maintenance needs.
process: Step 1: Thorough Inspection and Damage Assessment
Step 2: Detailed Repair Plan and Cost Estimate
Step 3: Professional Repair and Replacement of Damaged Components
Step 4: Final Inspection and Quality Assurance
benefits: Extend the Lifespan of Your Fence

faq.question: How often should I have my fence inspected?
faq.answer: We recommend having your fence inspected at least once a year to identify and address any potential problems early on.

faq.question: What are the signs that my fence needs repair?
faq.answer: Signs that your fence needs repair include leaning posts, broken boards, sagging gates, and visible signs of rot or insect damage.

faq.question: Can you repair any type of fence?
faq.answer: Yes, we have experience repairing all types of fences, including wood, vinyl, chain link, and aluminum.

services.name: Gate Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Secure and stylish gates for residential and commercial properties.
services.description:
A well-functioning gate is essential for security, convenience, and curb appeal. Fence Factory provides expert gate installation and repair services throughout New York, ensuring that your gates are secure, reliable, and aesthetically pleasing. We install and repair all types of gates, including driveway gates, pedestrian gates, and security gates, for both residential and commercial properties.

We offer a wide range of gate styles and materials to match your fence and complement your property's architecture. From traditional wood gates to modern metal gates, we can create a custom gate that meets your specific needs and preferences. We also offer automated gate systems for added convenience and security.

Our experienced technicians handle all aspects of gate installation and repair, including hinge replacement, latch adjustment, and opener repair. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting performance. Whether you need a new gate installed or your existing gate repaired, Fence Factory delivers quality workmanship and reliable service.
process: Step 1: Site Evaluation and Design Consultation
Step 2: Material Selection and Gate Customization
Step 3: Precise Installation and Hardware Adjustment
Step 4: Automated System Integration (if applicable)

faq.question: What type of gate is best for my property?
faq.answer: The best type of gate for your property depends on your specific needs and preferences. We can help you choose the right style, material, and features to meet your requirements.

faq.question: Can you automate my existing gate?
faq.answer: Yes, we can automate most existing gates with a compatible gate opener system.

faq.question: How often should I have my gate serviced?
faq.answer: We recommend having your gate serviced at least once a year to ensure proper operation and prevent costly repairs.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Fence Factory did an amazing job installing my new wood fence in my backyard. The team was professional, efficient, and the fence looks fantastic! They were very communicative throughout the entire process, and the price was very reasonable. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: I needed a chain link fence installed around my commercial property for security purposes. Fence Factory provided a quick and affordable solution. The installation was completed within a day, and the fence is sturdy and well-built. I had a minor issue with the gate latch, but they came back and fixed it promptly.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: I am so happy with my new vinyl fence from Fence Factory! It has completely transformed my backyard. The quality of the materials is excellent, and the installation was flawless. The crew was very respectful of my property and cleaned up everything afterwards. I've already received so many compliments from my neighbors.

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: After a bad storm, my wood fence was damaged. Fence Factory came out quickly and repaired it perfectly. You can't even tell it was damaged. Very professional, great price, and excellent service. They saved me from having to replace the entire fence!

reviews.name: Susan P.
reviews.text: Fence Factory installed an aluminum fence around my pool area. It looks beautiful and adds a touch of elegance to my backyard. The installation team was very professional and efficient. The only reason I'm not giving 5 stars is that there was a slight delay in getting the permit approved, but that wasn't their fault.

reviews.name: Michael R.
reviews.text: Our driveway gate was completely broken and we couldn't get in or out of our property. Fence Factory came to our rescue! They fixed the gate quickly and efficiently, and the price was very reasonable. I highly recommend them for any gate repair needs.
